# services.corteza

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.corteza`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.corteza.address` | `string` | IP for the HTTP server. |
| `services.corteza.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Corteza, a low-code platform. |
| `services.corteza.group` | `string` | The group to run Corteza under. |
| `services.corteza.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open ports in the firewall. |
| `services.corteza.package` | `package` | The corteza package to use. |
| `services.corteza.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port for the HTTP server. |
| `services.corteza.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of string` | Configuration for Corteza, will be passed as environment variables. See <https://docs.cortezaproject.org/corteza-docs/2024.9/devops-guide/references/configuration/server.html>. |
| `services.corteza.settings.HTTP_WEBAPP_ENABLED` | `boolean` | Whether to enable webapps. |
| `services.corteza.user` | `string` | The user to run Corteza under. |
